name: agentoracle-mcp
description: MCP server that connects AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf) to AgentOracle's real-time research API. Agents can research any topic and get structured JSON with summary, key facts, sources, and confidence scores via x402 protocol on Base.

tools.name: research
tools.description: Real-time research on any topic — structured JSON with summary, key facts, sources, confidence score. $0.02 USDC via x402.

tools.name: deep-research
tools.description: Comprehensive deep analysis with expert findings, 10-15 facts, and analysis paragraph. $0.10 USDC via x402.

tools.name: check-health
tools.description: Check if AgentOracle API is online with service status, uptime, and pricing.

tools.name: get-manifest
tools.description: Get the x402 payment manifest with pricing, networks, and endpoint details.
